# Career Readiness Assessment {#career-readiness-assessment}

<style>
/* -- CHAPTER NAV TABS -- */
.cr-chapter-nav { display:flex; gap:0.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; margin-top:3rem; padding:0.35rem; background:var(--surface); border:1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius:50px; width:fit-content; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}
.cr-nav-btn{background:none; border:none; padding:0.55rem 1.3rem; font-family:var(--font-body); font-size:0.88rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-muted); cursor:pointer; border-radius:50px; transition:all .18s;}
.cr-nav-btn:hover{ color:var(--navy); background:#fff;}
.cr-nav-btn.active{ background:var(--navy); color:#fff;}
.cr-panel{display:none}
.cr-panel.active{display:block}

/* checklist */
.cr-checklist-wrap{background:var(--white); border:1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm); overflow:hidden; margin:1.4rem 0;}
.cr-checklist-header{background:var(--navy); color:#fff; padding:.7rem 1.4rem; font-size:.78rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.1em}
.cr-checklist-item{display:flex; gap:1rem; padding:.95rem 1.4rem; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.15s;}
.cr-checklist-item.checked{background:#f0fdf4}
.cr-checklist-item:hover{background:#f9f9f9}
.cr-checklist-checkbox{width:20px; height:20px; border:2px solid var(--border); border-radius:5px; transition:all 0.15s;}
.cr-checklist-item.checked .cr-checklist-checkbox{background:var(--teal)}
.cr-progress-bar{height:10px; background:var(--border); border-radius:50px; overflow:hidden; margin-top:0.5rem;}
.cr-progress-fill{height:100%; background:var(--teal); width:0%}
.cr-checklist-footer{padding:.9rem 1.4rem; background:var(--surface); display:flex; gap:1rem; align-items:center; flex-direction:column;}

/* calculator */
.cr-calc-row{display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:.9rem 1.4rem; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); font-size:0.95rem; background:var(--white); border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:0.6rem; box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}
.cr-calc-row select{padding:0.35rem 0.6rem; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #ccc; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;}
.cr-score-box{margin-top:2rem; text-align:center; padding:2rem; background:var(--white); border-radius:12px; box-shadow:var(--shadow-md); transition:all 0.2s;}
.cr-score-box:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
.cr-score{font-size:3rem; font-weight:800; color:var(--navy); margin:0.5rem 0;}
.cr-score-text{font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-muted)}

/* next steps */
#cr-next p{font-size:1rem; margin-bottom:1rem; line-height:1.6;}
#cr-next ul{background:var(--white); border-radius:10px; padding:1rem 1.5rem; box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}
#cr-next li{margin-bottom:0.6rem; font-size:0.95rem; line-height:1.5;}
</style>

<!-- CHAPTER NAV -->
<div class="cr-chapter-nav cr-nav">
<button class="cr-nav-btn active" onclick="crShowPanel('cr-overview',this)">Overview</button>
<button class="cr-nav-btn" onclick="crShowPanel('cr-checklist',this)">Checklist</button>
<button class="cr-nav-btn" onclick="crShowPanel('cr-calculator',this)">Calculator</button>
<button class="cr-nav-btn" onclick="crShowPanel('cr-next',this)">Next Steps</button>
</div>

<!-- OVERVIEW -->
<div id="cr-overview" class="cr-panel active">
<h2 style="margin-top:0;">Chapter Overview</h2>
<div style="background:var(--white); border:1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:2rem 2.4rem; margin-bottom:1.8rem; box-shadow:var(--shadow-md);">
<div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.18em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--teal); margin-bottom:0.6rem;">Chapter Overview</div>
<div style="font-size:1rem; color:var(--text-body); line-height:1.7; max-width:640px;">
This chapter helps you evaluate whether you are ready to begin applying for jobs or internships. You will assess your preparation across skills, projects, professional presence, and interview readiness so you can focus on the areas that will most improve your chances of success.
</div>
</div>

<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:1.2rem; margin-bottom:1.8rem;">
<div style="background:var(--white); border:1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:1.4rem; box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);">
<div style="font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:var(--teal); margin-bottom:0.7rem;">What You Will Learn</div>
<ul style="list-style:none; padding:0; margin:0; font-size:0.93rem; color:var(--text-body); line-height:2;">
<li>&#10003;&nbsp; How to evaluate whether you are ready to apply for roles</li>
<li>&#10003;&nbsp; Which areas of preparation matter most to employers</li>
<li>&#10003;&nbsp; How to identify gaps in your career preparation</li>
<li>&#10003;&nbsp; How to create a focused plan to improve readiness</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div style="background:var(--white); border:1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:1.4rem; box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);">
<div style="font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:var(--teal); margin-bottom:0.7rem;">What Is Inside</div>
<ul style="list-style:none; padding:0; margin:0; font-size:0.93rem; color:var(--text-body); line-height:2;">
<li>&#9656;&nbsp; <strong>Checklist</strong> — Evaluate your preparation</li>
<li>&#9656;&nbsp; <strong>Calculator</strong> — Measure your readiness score</li>
<li>&#9656;&nbsp; <strong>Next Steps</strong> — Improve areas that need work</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div style="background:var(--teal-light); border-left:4px solid var(--teal); border-radius:0 var(--radius-sm) var(--radius-sm) 0; padding:1.1rem 1.4rem; font-size:0.93rem; color:var(--text-body); line-height:1.75;">
<strong>How to use this chapter:</strong> Start by reviewing your current skills and experiences to understand where you stand. Then, explore the assessment sections to identify areas for growth. Use the checklist and calculator to measure readiness, and follow the next steps to improve your preparation. Revisit this page periodically to track your progress.
</div>
</div>

<!-- CHECKLIST -->
<div id="cr-checklist" class="cr-panel">
<h2>Career Readiness Checklist</h2>
<div class="cr-checklist-wrap" id="crChecklist">
<div class="cr-checklist-header">Preparation</div>
<div class="cr-checklist-item" onclick="crToggleCheck(this)"><div class="cr-checklist-checkbox"></div><div>You have at least 2–3 strong projects.</div></div>
<div class="cr-checklist-item" onclick="crToggleCheck(this)"><div class="cr-checklist-checkbox"></div><div>Your resume clearly communicates your skills and experience.</div></div>
<div class="cr-checklist-item" onclick="crToggleCheck(this)"><div class="cr-checklist-checkbox"></div><div>Your LinkedIn profile is updated and professional.</div></div>
<div class="cr-checklist-item" onclick="crToggleCheck(this)"><div class="cr-checklist-checkbox"></div><div>You can confidently explain your projects.</div></div>
<div class="cr-checklist-item" onclick="crToggleCheck(this)"><div class="cr-checklist-checkbox"></div><div>You have practiced common interview questions.</div></div>
<div class="cr-checklist-item" onclick="crToggleCheck(this)"><div class="cr-checklist-checkbox"></div><div>You have a clear idea of the roles you want.</div></div>
<div class="cr-checklist-footer">
<div class="cr-progress-bar"><div class="cr-progress-fill" id="crChecklistFill"></div></div>
<div id="crChecklistLabel">0 complete</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- CALCULATOR -->
<div id="cr-calculator" class="cr-panel">
<h2>Career Readiness Calculator</h2>
<p>Rate each category from 1–5.</p>
<div id="crCalc">
<div class="cr-calc-row">Technical Skills <select onchange="crCalcScore()"><option>1</option><option>2</option><option>3</option><option>4</option><option>5</option></select></div>
<div class="cr-calc-row">Portfolio Projects <select onchange="crCalcScore()"><option>1</option><option>2</option><option>3</option><option>4</option><option>5</option></select></div>
<div class="cr-calc-row">Resume Quality <select onchange="crCalcScore()"><option>1</option><option>2</option><option>3</option><option>4</option><option>5</option></select></div>
<div class="cr-calc-row">LinkedIn Profile <select onchange="crCalcScore()"><option>1</option><option>2</option><option>3</option><option>4</option><option>5</option></select></div>
<div class="cr-calc-row">Interview Preparation <select onchange="crCalcScore()"><option>1</option><option>2</option><option>3</option><option>4</option><option>5</option></select></div>
</div>
<div class="cr-score-box">
<div>Your Score</div>
<div class="cr-score" id="crScore">5</div>
<div class="cr-score-text" id="crScoreText">Early Preparation</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- NEXT STEPS -->
<div id="cr-next" class="cr-panel">
<h2>Next Steps</h2>

<div class="cr-score-box" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <div>Your Current Score</div>
  <div class="cr-score" id="nextCrScore">5</div>
  <div class="cr-score-text" id="nextCrScoreText">Early Preparation</div>
</div>

<p id="nextStepMessage">Once you identify gaps in your readiness, focus on the improvements that will have the biggest impact on your job search.</p>
<ul id="nextStepList">
<li>Build additional projects to strengthen your portfolio</li>
<li>Improve your resume to clearly show impact</li>
<li>Practice explaining your projects and technical decisions</li>
<li>Strengthen your LinkedIn presence</li>
<li>Begin networking with professionals in your field</li>
</ul>
</div>

<script>
function crShowPanel(id,btn){
  document.querySelectorAll('.cr-panel').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'))
  document.querySelectorAll('.cr-nav-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'))
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active')
  btn.classList.add('active')
}

function crToggleCheck(item){
  item.classList.toggle('checked')
  crUpdate()
}

function crUpdate(){
  let items=document.querySelectorAll('#crChecklist .cr-checklist-item')
  let checked=document.querySelectorAll('#crChecklist .checked')
  let pct=(checked.length/items.length)*100
  document.getElementById('crChecklistFill').style.width=pct+'%'
  document.getElementById('crChecklistLabel').innerText=checked.length+" complete"
}

function crCalcScore(){
  let selects=document.querySelectorAll('#crCalc select')
  let score=0
  selects.forEach(s=>score+=parseInt(s.value))
  document.getElementById('crScore').innerText=score

  let text=""
  if(score<=10){ text="Early Preparation"; }
  else if(score<=17){ text="Moderate Preparation"; }
  else{ text="Well Prepared"; }
  document.getElementById('crScoreText').innerText=text

  // Mirror score on Next Steps
  document.getElementById('nextCrScore').innerText = score
  document.getElementById('nextCrScoreText').innerText = text

  // Update next steps content
  let nextMsg=document.getElementById('nextStepMessage')
  let nextList=document.getElementById('nextStepList')
  if(score<=10){
    nextMsg.innerText="Your readiness is low. Focus on building foundational skills and experience."
    nextList.innerHTML=`<li>Develop more projects to strengthen your portfolio</li>
                        <li>Improve your resume layout and content</li>
                        <li>Enhance LinkedIn and professional presence</li>
                        <li>Practice basic interview questions</li>
                        <li>Identify target roles and industries</li>`
  } else if(score<=17){
    nextMsg.innerText="You are moderately prepared. Focus on refining your skills and showcasing experience."
    nextList.innerHTML=`<li>Polish existing projects to demonstrate impact</li>
                        <li>Update resume for clarity and achievements</li>
                        <li>Refine LinkedIn profile and network</li>
                        <li>Practice explaining projects confidently</li>
                        <li>Prepare for common interview questions</li>`
  } else{
    nextMsg.innerText="You are well prepared! Focus on fine-tuning and networking to maximize opportunities."
    nextList.innerHTML=`<li>Highlight projects with measurable outcomes</li>
                        <li>Ensure resume is optimized for roles</li>
                        <li>Maintain LinkedIn engagement</li>
                        <li>Practice advanced interview questions</li>
                        <li>Engage in networking and mentorship opportunities</li>`
  }
}
</script>
